mapper.sql: id , banner_1 , introduce_text_img_url , introduce_product_img_url , introduce_intro_img_url , product_positioning_text_img_url , product_feature_img_url , product_positioning_img_url
mapper.update:
update mlsd_brand_culture
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
banner_1 = #{record.banner1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
introduce_text_img_url = #{record.introduceTextImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
introduce_product_img_url = #{record.introduceProductImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
introduce_intro_img_url = #{record.introduceIntroImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_positioning_text_img_url = #{record.productPositioningTextImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_feature_img_url = #{record.productFeatureImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_positioning_img_url = #{record.productPositioningImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update mlsd_brand_culture
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
banner_1 = #{banner1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
introduce_text_img_url = #{introduceTextImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
introduce_product_img_url = #{introduceProductImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
introduce_intro_img_url = #{introduceIntroImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_positioning_text_img_url = #{productPositioningTextImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_feature_img_url = #{productFeatureImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_positioning_img_url = #{productPositioningImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id , banner_1 , introduce_text_img_url , introduce_product_img_url , introduce_intro_img_url , product_positioning_text_img_url , product_feature_img_url , product_positioning_img_url from mlsd_brand_culture where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select id , banner_1 , introduce_text_img_url , introduce_product_img_url , introduce_intro_img_url , product_positioning_text_img_url , product_feature_img_url , product_positioning_img_url from mlsd_brand_culture where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
